headline: Correction: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Perform on Equity Residential, Raises Price Target to $67
summary: Correction: Scotiabank analyst Nicholas Yulico maintains Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) with a Sector Perform and raises the price target from $66 to $67.
